prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次约312→314→341→268→777名，2021–2024年基本稳定在268–341名区间，2025年因新增临床医学专业（不报不录，最低位次777名）大幅后移约509名；剔除临床医学影响后，2025年主专业组最低位次约390名，整体仍属高位次区间；该校在吉林省理科/物理类招生计划2021–2025年均为38人；2026年计划37人，较2025年缩招约2.6%，小幅减少招生名额，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2026年稳定位列第7名（全国Top7），属于顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2025年高考周期声誉偏正面（李政道先生逝世，其曾为中科大少年班创立做出贡献）；2026年高考周期声誉偏负面（时任教授因贪污助不合资格学生入读硕士被判囚），但中科大整体学术声誉极高，影响有限；抖音热度为高热（总排名第12，综合热度约418万），短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度持续升温；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科多达19个，包括数学A+、物理学A+、化学A+、天文学A+、地球物理学A+、生物学A+、科学技术史A+、安全科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A等，学科实力顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、数学/统计等中科大核心专业社会热度持续偏热/高热；临床医学专业2026年继续招生（计划1人，不报不录），预计仍会拉低最低位次；吉林省2026年高考总人数约110868人，按近年物理类占比约72.2%估算物理类约80047人，与2025年80421人基本持平，竞争环境稳定；中科大位于安徽合肥（非本省），在吉林省招生占比约1–2.7%，属全国性招生布局；近年吉林省招生人数波动（2021年6人、2022年23人、2023年4人、2024年8人、2025年9人），2026年计划37人属正常水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次因临床医学专业大幅后移的基数效应、2026年缩招约2.6%的竞争加剧信号、抖音高热反映的关注度升温，以及中科大顶尖层次对高分考生的持续吸引力，预计2026年最低位次较2025年基准略有回升（数字减小）。预测最低位次约735名，波动区间651–819名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 量子信息科学（未来技术学院）
- 人工智能
- 工科试验班（拔尖计划英才班）（计算机类/电子信息类）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班）（数学类/物理学类）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 电子信息类（集成电路方向）
- 工科试验班（航空航天、人形机器人、低碳能源技术及安全）
- 物理学类（物理学、应用物理学、天文学、光电信息科学与工程）
- 网络空间安全。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化学类（智能化学与先进材料）
- 生物科学类（生物科学、生物技术）
- 核工程类（工程物理、核工程与核技术、应用物理学）
- 空间科学与技术（深空探测）
- 临床医学（学制5年，英才班，不报不录）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约735名，区间651–819名。位次在区间内建议以二档为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<651名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业（量子信息、人工智能、拔尖英才班）；位次接近区间上限（>819名）建议以三档为主、二档为辅，注意临床医学为不报不录专业。中科大各专业学科评估均为A-及以上，整体实力顶尖，各档专业均有极高培养质量。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 312 → 314 → 341 → 268 → 777. From 2021 to 2024, it was basically stable in the 268–341 range. In 2025, due to the addition of the Clinical Medicine major (no application, no admission, minimum ranking 777), it shifted significantly backward by about 509 places. Excluding the impact of Clinical Medicine, the minimum ranking for the main major group in 2025 was about 390, still in the high ranking range. The university's enrollment plan in Jilin Province for science/physics categories was 38 from 2021 to 2025. In 2026, the plan is 37, a reduction of about 2.6% compared to 2025, slightly decreasing enrollment slots and intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, it stably ranks 7th (Top 7 nationally), belonging to the top-tier university level, with strong appeal to high-scoring students. In the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation was slightly positive (the passing of Mr. Li Zhengdao, who contributed to the establishment of USTC's Special Class for the Gifted Young). In the 2026 cycle, the reputation is slightly negative (a professor was imprisoned for corruption in helping unqualified students gain admission to master's programs), but USTC's overall academic reputation is extremely high, with limited impact. Douyin popularity is high (total ranking 12th, comprehensive popularity about 4.18 million), with large short video exposure, reflecting increasing attention for applications. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are as many as 19 disciplines rated A- or above, including Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Chemistry A+, Astronomy A+, Geophysics A+, Biology A+, History of Science and Technology A+, Safety Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, etc. The discipline strength is top-notch and highly matches the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors at USTC such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Mathematics/Statistics continue to be relatively hot/very hot in social popularity. The Clinical Medicine major will continue enrollment in 2026 (plan 1, no application, no admission), expected to still lower the minimum ranking. The total number of college entrance exam takers in Jilin Province in 2026 is about 110,868. Estimating the physics category proportion at about 72.2% in recent years, the physics category is about 80,047, basically flat with 80,421 in 2025, with a stable competitive environment. USTC is located in Hefei, Anhui (not in this province), with enrollment in Jilin Province accounting for about 1–2.7%, part of a national enrollment layout. In recent years, enrollment numbers in Jilin have fluctuated (6 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 8 in 2024, 9 in 2025), and the 2026 plan of 37 is at a normal level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant backward shift in ranking in 2025 due to the Clinical Medicine major, the signal of intensified competition from a 2.6% enrollment reduction in 2026, the increased attention reflected by high Douyin popularity, and USTC's top-tier appeal to high-scoring students, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly recover (number decrease) compared to the 2025 baseline. Predicted minimum ranking is about 735, with a fluctuation range of 651–819.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Quantum Information Science (School of Future Technology)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Talent Program Elite Class) (Computer Science/Electronic Information)
- Science Experimental Class (Top Talent Program Science Elite Class) (Mathematics/Physics)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuit Direction)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Low-Carbon Energy Technology and Safety)
- Physics (Physics, Applied Physics, Astronomy, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Cyberspace Security.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemistry (Intelligent Chemistry and Advanced Materials)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Science, Biotechnology)
- Nuclear Engineering (Engineering Physics, Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology, Applied Physics)
- Space Science and Technology (Deep Space Exploration)
- Clinical Medicine (5-year program, Elite Class, no application, no admission).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 735, with a range of 651–819. If the ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main, Tier 1 as a sprint, and Tier 3 as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<651), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Quantum Information, Artificial Intelligence, Top Talent Elite Class). If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>819), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3, supplemented by Tier 2. Note that Clinical Medicine is a no application, no admission major. All majors at USTC have discipline evaluations of A- or above, with overall top-notch strength, and all tiers have extremely high training quality.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
